github.description: GitHub MCP for PR management, issues, and repository operations

playwright.description: Browser automation for navigating web UIs, taking screenshots, and interacting with pages

article-evaluator.description: Scores article drafts across 5 quality dimensions and returns a pass/fail verdict before publishing

style-memory.description: Query and update the ChromaDB-backed style memory store for Economist voice consistency

publication-validator.description: Publication validation — checks front-matter fields (layout, title, date, author, categories, image) and image-path existence before a post is published

web-researcher.description: Web search (Serper/Google), Google Scholar, arXiv academic search, and page fetching as MCP tools

image-generator.description: DALL-E 3 image generation for the content pipeline

published-topics.description: Query the published article archive for topic similarity and duplicate detection before commissioning new content
